description_long: This is a vintage-style motorcycle with a black frame and a brown leather seat, featuring classic spoked wheels and a rear luggage rack. The fuel tank is adorned with a distinctive emblem, and the engine is exposed, showcasing a traditional air-cooled design. The handlebars are simple and straight, equipped with round rear-view mirrors and a single headlamp at the front. The rear fender supports a license plate and a taillight, while the exhaust pipe runs along the right side of the bike. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, with visible mechanical components and minimal bodywork. The motorcycle exudes a retro aesthetic, likely reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century models.
description: A vintage black motorcycle with a brown leather seat, spoked wheels, and a classic exposed engine, featuring a rear luggage rack and distinctive emblem on the fuel tank.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the taillight, license plate, rear fender, and the brown seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the spoked wheels, exposed engine, fuel tank emblem, and rear luggage rack.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the headlamp, handlebars, and front fender.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipe, engine, and the overall profile of the motorcycle.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museum of Engineering and Technology, Krakow
